videos.headline: Cade Klubnik connects with Antonio Williams on 57-yard Clemson TD
videos.description: Cade Klubnik finds Antonio Williams for a 57-yard touchdown catch and run, marking Clemson's first touchdown vs. FSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik connects with Antonio Williams on 57-yard Clemson TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik slings 23-yard TD for Clemson
videos.description: Cade Klubnik picks out T.J. Moore in the end zone for a dazzling 23-yard touchdown for Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik slings 23-yard TD for Clemson) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brock Glenn delivers to get FSU on the board
videos.description: Brock Glenn threads the needle to Amaree Williams snagging a 13-yard first touchdown for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brock Glenn delivers to get FSU on the board) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Patrick Payton blocks Clemson's field goal in 3rd quarter
videos.description: Patrick Payton blocks Clemson's 25-yard field goal attempt, luckily to be recovered by Clemson's Clay Swinney.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Patrick Payton blocks Clemson's field goal in 3rd quarter) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
